title: Rhaphidorhynchus citratus
intro: There is no information available about the plant Rhaphidorhynchus citratus.
taxonomy: Rhaphidorhynchus citratus belongs to the family Aporocotaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to New Caledonia, an island country in the Pacific Ocean. The classification of Rhaphidorhynchus citratus is still being researched and updated by botanists. However, based on available data, it is classified under the kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification within these categories.
preparations: I couldn't find any information about Rhaphidorhynchus citratus, so I don't know if herbal preparations are associated with it.
